name: Light Pill #8 - The Time Weaver
description: The Time Weaver - A glowing capsule that reveals the threads of chronology and temporal patterns to those who dare to step outside the moment. Part of the Light Pill Project: surreal, mystical experiences for those who embrace the unknown.

attributes.value: Bronze-scaled robe that shifts like overlapping clockwork
Hourglass that flows in both directions simultaneously
Gilded sandals that leave fading footprints
Floating clockwork mechanisms in a timeless void
Yesterday and tomorrow are just different rooms in the same infinite palace.
You must weave three temporal threads - one from a moment you wish to relive, one from a moment you fear, and one from a moment that never was. Tie them together and watch what timeline emerges.
Must be taken at the stroke of midnight

properties.ai_prompt: Surreal fashion editorial of The Time Weaver floating in a timeless void with intricate clockwork mechanisms, wearing a bronze-scaled robe that moves like overlapping gears, holding an hourglass where sand flows both up and down simultaneously. Chronos Gold aura with Spiral Flow energy, gilded sandals leaving temporal echoes, cinematic lighting that shows multiple moments happening at once, 8K, hyperdetailed with visible time streams and clockwork intricacies.
